title: Can I automatically link a Contact to a Company based on the domain of the Contact when the contact is created automatically from an email?
excerpt:
We have two Boards for companies/entities: 

Companies
Potential Deals

There is a link from Contacts to these two Boards so we can associate a Contact with these.

posts.author: mfriedma (Michael Friedman)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have two Boards for companies/entities:

  1. Companies
  2. Potential Deals

There is a link from Contacts to these two Boards so we can associate a Contact with these.

I would like to be able to put a Domain into the Company and Potential Deal. Then when a new Contact is created, link the Company / Potential Deal based on that.

For example, if Company is Reflect Ventures with domain reflectvenures.com then when a contact is created for blahblah@example.com I want it to automatically link to the Company Reflect Ventures.

Is this possible?

posts.author: knoxy (Duncan)
posts.cookedHtml: Please could we get an answer to this? This is standard functionality for a sales CRM.
